rulings.Case Title: GEORI TOLOZA ET AL VS. DENG BOUTDY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default Ccp 473.5 Ccp 473d And Quash Service Of Summons Ccp 418.10
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 15, 2019 line 1. DEFENDANTS DENG BOUTDY, MAY BOUTDY, AND MALAYKHAM BOUTDY'S Motion To Set Aside Default Ccp 473.5 Ccp 473d And Quash Service Of Summons Ccp 418.10 GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. DEFENDANT'S DEFAULTS ARE SET ASIDE. DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS IS GRANTED. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: DAVID POST VS. REDFIN CORPORATION ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 15, 2019 line 3. CROSS DEFENDANTs ANDREW WARREN and VANGUARD PROPERTIES, INC. DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT continued to May 15, 2019. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 27.B and provide a courtesy copy of opposition no later than May 1, 2019 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 15, 2019 line 3 CROSS DEFENDANTs ANDREW WARREN AND VANGUARD PROPERTIES, INC.'S Motion To Strike Portions Of Complaint continued to May 15, 2019. rulings.Case Title: GUILLERMO SEGURA VS. MARIO PEREZ ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Vacate Default Judgment, Set Aside Writ Of Possession, Stay Lockout And Declaration Of Defendant Eva Nunuz
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 15, 2019 line 4. DEFENDANT EVA NUNEZ's Motion To Vacate Default Judgment, Set Aside Writ Of Possession, Stay Lockout And Declaration Of Defendant Eva Nunuz DENIED. Moving party failed to sustain her burden. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: GUILLERMO SEGURA VS. MARIO PEREZ ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Eva Nunez To Vacate / Void Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 15, 2019 line 4. Defendant Eva Nunez To Vacate / Void Judgment DENIED. There is nothing in the judgment roll to suggest that the judgment is void. Defendant was served by substitute service by a registered process server as the judgment roll reflects. Defendant does not suggest any other deficiencies that may be determined from the judgment roll. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: 2B LIVING INC. VS. SIMON IRELAND ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 15, 2019 line 5. DEFENDANT SIMON IRELAND's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently states a cause of action for unlawful detainer re: garage space =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: SUSAN BALDINI VS. RACHEL GUNNELLS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 15, 2019 line 7. DEFENDANT RACHEL GUNNELLS's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT DENIED. Triable issue of fact regarding Defendant's occupancy, tenant vs. licensee. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: CASSANDRA CHATHAM VS. ADAM TRESTYN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery, To Establish Admissions From Defendant, And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 15, 2019 line 6. PLAINTIFF CASSANDRA CHATHAM's Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery, To Establish Admissions From Defendant, And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant GRANTED, subject to opposition. Defendant shall provide complete verified responses without objections to Special Interrogatories, Form Interrogatories and Requests for production within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Admissions are deemed admitted. Sanctions granted in the amount of $700. = (501/CFH)
